nodes.name: 塞拉利昂
nodes.summary: 塞拉利昂是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联88种鸟类，包括Blue quail、Ahanta spurfowl、Yellow-billed turaco等88种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Northern red bishop
nodes.summary: Northern red bishop（Northern red bishop，学名 Euplectes franciscanus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联16个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This species inhabits northern Liberia, southern Mauritania, Senegambia, Guinea, north Sierra Leone, east Eritrea, Ethiopia, northwest and southern Somalia, northeast Democratic Republic of the Congo, North Uganda, Burkina Faso, northern Ivory Coast, South Chad, North Cameroon, Sudan, Tanzania, and Kenya. Northern red bishops generally reside in tall grasslands or cultivated areas near water and marshes
